---
date: "2025-07-06"
draft: false
description: A review of Marion Fourcade and Kieran Healy's *The Ordinal Society*.
title: "From the subprime to the premium, from California to fascism?"
subtitle: Published in *Journal of Cultural Economy*.
title-block-style: none
toc: false
categories: 
  - Finance
  - Digital Technologies
  - Segregation
engine: knitr 
paper:
  pdf: "subprime_premium.pdf"
---

<button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-success">

<a href="https://doi.org/10.1080/17530350.2025.2523771">Journal</a>

</button>

## Abstract

An invited review of Marion Fourcade and Kieran Healy (2024) *The Ordinal Society*, Harvard University Press.

## PDF

```{css echo=FALSE}
.embed-container {
    position: relative;
    padding-bottom: 129%;
    height: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    max-width: 100%;
}

.embed-container iframe,
.embed-container object,
.embed-container embed {
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
}
```

```{=html}
<div class="embed-container">
  <iframe src="`r rmarkdown::metadata$paper$pdf`" style="border: 0.5px"></iframe>
</div>
```
